title: Control Attestation
description: SD-JWT VC schema for the WeBuild Control Attestation (vct: eu.we-build:control:1). Provides a complete, verifiable representation of an entity's control structure, recording all natural persons, legal entities, and legal arrangements which have direct or indirect control over a legal entity. Compliant with AMLR 2024/1624.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type identifier. SHALL be the fixed string 'eu.we-build:control:1'.

iss.description: Issuer identifier (DID or URI) of the entity that issued this attestation.

iat.description: Issued-at time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL be in the past.

exp.description: Expiry time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL be greater than iat.

jti.description: Unique identifier for this credential instance (JWT ID).

issuing_entity.description: Identifier of the legal entity subject to the control disclosure obligation.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of this attestation per eIDAS 2. SHALL be 'EAA' (self-issued) or 'QEAA' (issued by a QTSP or authorised competent body). NOT selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the schema used for this attestation.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL where the trust anchor for verifying this attestation can be retrieved.

controller.description: Array of Controller entries. SHALL contain at least one entry. At least one entry SHALL be of type 'Person' to satisfy AML requirements.

status.description: Revocation status claim. MUST be present if the validity period is greater than 24 hours.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential document containing the status bitstring.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring corresponding to this credential.

cnf.description: Confirmation claim binding the credential to the holder's key material per RFC 7800.

jwk.description: JSON Web Key of the holder.

Controller.title: Controller
Controller.description: A single Controller entry representing a natural person, legal entity, or legal arrangement that exercises direct or indirect control over the subject legal entity.

type.description: Discriminator field determining which sub-object (person or entity) is present. SHALL be 'Person' or 'Entity'.

jurisdiction.description: Country of legal relevance for this controller entry. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

person.description: Personal identity attributes. SHALL be present when type = 'Person'. SHALL be absent when type = 'Entity'.

entity.description: Legal entity or legal arrangement attributes. SHALL be present when type = 'Entity'. SHALL be absent when type = 'Person'.

address.description: Address of the controller — residential for Person, registered for Entity.

controls.description: Object describing how control is exercised by this controller.

effective_date.description: Date when this control relationship became legally effective. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

evidence.description: Supporting evidence substantiating the declared control. SHALL contain at least one entry.

Person.title: Person
Person.description: Personal identity attributes of the natural person exercising control.

first_name.description: First name(s) of the natural person, including middle names where applicable. SHALL be non-empty.

surname.description: Surname(s) or family name(s) of the natural person. SHALL be non-empty.

birth_date.description: Date of birth of the natural person. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) in the past. Optional but SHOULD be included where available.

Entity.title: Entity
Entity.description: Legal entity or legal arrangement exercising control. Further classified by category field.

category.description: Classification of the entity controller. SHALL be 'legal_entity' or 'legal_arrangement'.

name.description: Complete official registered name of the entity or legal arrangement. SHALL be non-empty.

identifier.description: Formal identifiers for the entity. At least one sub-field (euid, lei, tax, or other) SHALL be present.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 jurisdiction in which the entity is registered or legally domiciled. SHALL be non-empty.

form.description: Legal form of the entity. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.6.

subtype_info.description: Additional information mandatory when category = 'legal_arrangement' or form = 'trust'.

EntityIdentifier.title: EntityIdentifier
EntityIdentifier.description: Formal identifiers for a legal entity or legal arrangement. At least one sub-field SHALL be present.

euid.description: European Unique Identifier per Directive (EU) 2017/1132. Optional.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier per ISO 17442. 20-character alphanumeric code. Optional.

tax.description: National tax or registration number. Optional.

other.description: Any other applicable legal identifier. Optional.

SubtypeInfo.title: SubtypeInfo
SubtypeInfo.description: Additional mandatory attributes for legal arrangements (trusts, foundations, etc.). Required when entity.category = 'legal_arrangement' or entity.form = 'trust'.

settlement.description: The instrument or document establishing the legal arrangement (e.g., trust deed reference or description). SHALL be non-empty.

purpose.description: The declared purpose of the legal arrangement. SHALL be non-empty.

assets.description: Description of assets held within the legal arrangement. SHALL be non-empty.

reason_for_registration.description: The reason the legal arrangement was formally registered. Optional.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Physical address of the controller — residential for Person, registered office for Entity.

street.description: Street name of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

house_number.description: House or building number of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

locality.description: City or locality of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

region.description: State, province, or region of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

country.description: Country of the address. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

Controls.title: Controls
Controls.description: Object describing how and to what degree the controller exercises control over the subject entity.

type.description: Array of control mechanism types. SHALL contain at least one value from Section 2.8.3. Multiple values MAY be present.

items.description: A single control mechanism type code from Section 2.8.3.

level.description: How the control is held. SHALL be one of: 'direct', 'indirect', 'joint', or 'unknown' as defined in Section 2.8.2.

basis.description: Legal or structural basis for the control. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.4.

voting_percentage.description: Percentage of voting rights held by the controller (0–100). Optional.

appointment_rights.description: Free text details on appointment rights held by the controller. Optional.

other_details.description: Free text for other control mechanisms not captured by structured fields. Optional.

rights.description: Array of economic rights associated with the control. SHALL contain at least one value from Section 2.8.5.

items.description: An economic rights code from Section 2.8.5.

Evidence.title: Evidence
Evidence.description: Supporting evidence substantiating the declared control relationship. At least one entry SHALL be present per Controller.

id.description: Unique identifier, URI, or URN of the source or evidence document. SHALL be non-empty.

type.description: Type of evidence document. SHALL use a value from Section 2.8.9.

url.description: URI reference to the publicly accessible source or evidence document. Optional.

data.description: Base64-encoded source document. SHALL be provided if url is absent or not publicly accessible.
